cancel.not_found: I couldn't find that to cancel — it might have already been removed.
clarification.no_button.speak: OK, I won't add that reminder.
clarification.card.title: Is this right?
query.empty.next: You don't have any upcoming reminders.
query.empty.today: You have nothing on your list for today.
query.empty.tomorrow: You have nothing on your list for tomorrow.
success.partial.aside_unparsed: . I wasn't sure what "{unparsed}" meant — tap Cancel on the card if that was important.
success.partial.aside_no_unparsed: . Tap Cancel on the card if that's not what you meant.
error.no_tasks_app: I can't add tasks because no tasks app is installed.
error.no_lists: Your tasks app doesn't have any lists set up yet.
error.tasks_save_failed: I couldn't save that task. Check the tasks app has permission.
error.calendar_no_time: That reminder has no time, so I can't put it on the calendar.
error.calendar_no_permission: I need calendar write access to save that.
error.calendar_no_writable: I couldn't find any writable calendars.
error.calendar_save_failed: I couldn't add that to the calendar.
partial_card.body.unparsed: I didn't understand "{unparsed}". Tap Cancel if that was important.
partial_card.body.no_unparsed: Tap Cancel if that's not what you meant.
